욥기 39:1.content: “Do you know the time when the mountain goats give birth? Do you watch when the doe bears fawns?

욥기 39:2.content: Can you count the months that they fulfill? Or do you know the time when they give birth?

욥기 39:3.content: They bow themselves. They bear their young. They end their labor pains.

욥기 39:4.content: Their young ones become strong. They grow up in the open field. They go out, and don’t return again.

욥기 39:5.content: “Who has set the wild donkey free? Or who has loosened the bonds of the swift donkey,

욥기 39:6.content: whose home I have made the wilderness, and the salt land his dwelling place?

욥기 39:7.content: He scorns the tumult of the city, neither does he hear the shouting of the driver.

욥기 39:8.content: The range of the mountains is his pasture, He searches after every green thing.

욥기 39:9.content: “Will the wild ox be content to serve you? Or will he stay by your feeding trough?

욥기 39:10.content: Can you hold the wild ox in the furrow with his harness? Or will he till the valleys after you?

욥기 39:11.content: Will you trust him, because his strength is great? Or will you leave to him your labor?

욥기 39:12.content: Will you confide in him, that he will bring home your seed, and gather the grain of your threshing floor?

욥기 39:13.content: “The wings of the ostrich wave proudly; but are they the feathers and plumage of love?

욥기 39:14.content: For she leaves her eggs on the earth, warms them in the dust,

욥기 39:15.content: and forgets that the foot may crush them, or that the wild animal may trample them.

욥기 39:16.content: She deals harshly with her young ones, as if they were not hers. Though her labor is in vain, she is without fear,

욥기 39:17.content: because God has deprived her of wisdom, neither has he imparted to her understanding.

욥기 39:18.content: When she lifts up herself on high, she scorns the horse and his rider.

욥기 39:19.content: “Have you given the horse might? Have you clothed his neck with a quivering mane?

욥기 39:20.content: Have you made him to leap as a locust? The glory of his snorting is awesome.

욥기 39:21.content: He paws in the valley, and rejoices in his strength. He goes out to meet the armed men.

욥기 39:22.content: He mocks at fear, and is not dismayed, neither does he turn back from the sword.

욥기 39:23.content: The quiver rattles against him, the flashing spear and the javelin.

욥기 39:24.content: He eats up the ground with fierceness and rage, neither does he stand still at the sound of the trumpet.

욥기 39:25.content: As often as the trumpet sounds he snorts, ‘Aha!’ He smells the battle afar off, the thunder of the captains, and the shouting.

욥기 39:26.content: “Is it by your wisdom that the hawk soars, and stretches her wings toward the south?

욥기 39:27.content: Is it at your command that the eagle mounts up, and makes his nest on high?

욥기 39:28.content: On the cliff he dwells, and makes his home, on the point of the cliff, and the stronghold.

욥기 39:29.content: From there he spies out the prey. His eyes see it afar off.

욥기 39:30.content: His young ones also suck up blood. Where the slain are, there he is.”
